owner_or_host: (industrial use; Pioneer Iron Works foundry until WWII; long decline after)
notes: Red brick foundry building; rebuilt after 1881 fire; Pioneer St named after the foundry
100 windows cut in 2011 renovation; architect Sam Trimble; ~$200K initial budget largely from Yellin art sales; briefly named Intercourse
Five feet of water on ground floor from Hurricane Sandy; reconstruction restarted
Reopened under current name; 40-foot ceilings; cathedral-scale main hall; adjoining garden with CSA
$12.7M ADA renovation completed; ADA elevator + new HVAC + roof + 2 mezzanines; 16-ft 1890s telescope on roof for planned public observatory
